channel.title: Scraper on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Scraper on Arrans github.io

item.title: mendableai/firecrawl
item.description: 🔥 Turn entire websites into LLM-ready markdown or structured data. Scrape, crawl and extract with a single API.

item.title: getmaxun/maxun
item.description: 🔥 No Code Web Data Extraction Platform • Open-Source Alternative To Octoparse, ParseHub 🔥
